title: Career Opportunity Teacher at CL Educate

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at CL Educate
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!
